method: Search top-result pages were reviewed for layout and information architecture only. Raw Google HTML scraping was not used. Article wording is original and does not copy competitor text.
formatPrinciplesApplied: Add updated date, reading time, and verification basis directly under the lead.
Add an at-a-glance block before the long article body.
Add a verdict or practical-decision box above the checklist.
Add good-sign/watch-out blocks, similar to review pros/cons patterns.
Keep a jump-link table of contents.
Show top pages checked separately from official/source links.
Use comparison tables for decision support.
Keep monetized links absent until human approval.

observedTopPagePatterns.pattern: Hero image, verdict box, pros/cons, jump links, specs, test results.
Review subtitle, author/date, verdict, price context, pros/cons, jump-to navigation, should-you-buy section.
Measurement-led review, specs, use-case scores, comparison structure.

markets.ourFormatResponse: Added verdict, pros/cons-style decision signals, top pages checked, comparison table, and source verification.

observedTopPagePatterns.pattern: H1, subtitle, image, date, author, direct explainer intro, list of notice types.
Official campaign hub and service entry points.
Official campaign timing and assistance details.

markets.ourFormatResponse: Added updated date, practical criterion box, notice-check checklist, date/action table, and official source grouping.

observedTopPagePatterns.pattern: Deal headline, discount subtitle, last updated timestamp, author, reading time, hero image, price/coupon context.
Deal hook, price framing, coupon/store context.

markets.ourFormatResponse: Added quick deal verdict, price/seller watch-outs, purchase checklist, and comparison table without affiliate links.

observedTopPagePatterns.pattern: At-a-glance bullets, rumored features, timeline, last-updated note, sectioned roundup.
Feature list and model-specific rumor framing.
Launch timing hook and concise report analysis.

markets.ourFormatResponse: Added at-a-glance, rumor verdict, wait/not-wait signals, Japan-specific checks, and top-rumor reference list.

observedTopPagePatterns.pattern: Policy announcement framing and all-track reflection summary.
Student-facing explanation of measure-level disadvantages and university differences.
Admissions-track scope, university autonomy, timing context.

markets.ourFormatResponse: Added core-decision box, university-specific watch-outs, applicant checklist, track comparison table, and top-page reference block.
